---
title: "Slides"
subtitle: "Presentation deck — Pakistan.AI · ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D"
toc: false
---

The 14-slide presentation deck (~20 minutes), in the Pakistan.AI house style.
[⬇ Download PDF](ISIC2024-slides.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm role="button"}

::: {style="position:relative;width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;margin:1.25rem 0;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;"}
<iframe src="ISIC2024-slides.pdf#view=FitH" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;" title="ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D presentation deck (Pakistan.AI)" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
If the deck does not render inline in your browser, open the [PDF directly](ISIC2024-slides.pdf).
:::
